info.name: Task 4 - Project 2 - Activity Log / Audit Trail
info.description: Audit Trail API. Flow: Signup Admin (with adminSecret) -> Login Admin (stores {{adminToken}}). Signup User -> Login User (stores {{userToken}}, {{targetUserId}}). Perform sensitive actions (update/block/unblock/delete) which write audit logs, then fetch the audit trail with filters (user/action/date) — admin only.
